description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular form and a pointed peak. Its surface is predominantly rough and weathered, featuring a mix of earthy brown and dark gray tones with some lighter patches. The rock has a prominent, jagged edge and a partially hollowed or concave section visible from one side, suggesting natural erosion or breakage. The texture is coarse, with visible striations and pitted areas, giving it a distinctly natural appearance. Its mass and size make it suitable as a substantial obstacle or barrier in an urban environment, such as a park or roadside. The rock appears solid, with no visible artificial modifications or markings.
description: A large, rugged, brown and gray rock with a jagged peak and rough, weathered surfaces, featuring a partially hollowed side.
description_view_0: The rock appears tall and pointed, with a prominent peak and a mix of brown and gray textures.
description_view_1: This side shows a flatter, broad face with deep brown coloration and visible surface striations.
description_view_2: A concave, hollowed section is visible, revealing a darker interior and sharp, angular edges.
description_view_3: The rock displays a relatively flat, vertical face with subtle striping and a more uniform brown-gray coloration.
